description: A tall rectangular fresco divided into three horizontal registers, characteristic of the Palazzo Schifanoia cycle in Ferrara. The upper register shows a courtly procession with elegantly dressed figures, a triumphal chariot drawn by white horses, and architectural elements. The middle register features a zodiacal or astrological scene with a central seated figure in red flanked by symbolic animals (including a unicorn-like creature) and standing figures. The lower register depicts everyday civic and agricultural life: buildings, horsemen, carts, workers, and a bustling town scene.
